title: Fresh Gui
body:
![Front](https://i.imgur.com/2QSztm1.png)
## 🖼️ About:
"Fresh Gui" is a pack that renews the textures of the original GUI of the game, I did it for fun and it is not necessarily an improvement of the original, but tries to give it a more interesting and beautiful touch (keeping the vanilla style).

![healthbar](https://i.imgur.com/allbax0.png)

The pack is compatible with several mods, so it is very convenient to use it with modpacks. Here is a list:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Quark
- Farmers delight
- Jei
- Mod menu
- Catalogue
- Sawmill
- Easy magic
- Corpse
- Detail armor bar
- Enchanting infuser
- Farmers respite
- Mannequins
- Polymorph
- Screenshot viewer
- Unusual prehistory

</details>

![preview](https://i.imgur.com/C1d6IDa.png)

## 📝 Info:
- ⚙️ Available for 1.20.x, 1.19.x and 1.18.x!!
- ⚠️ It can be included in modpacks, but please add credits :)
- 📋 If you want to support me I recommend you follow me on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/itistruly)
